name: TLGY ACQUISITION CORP
business: TLGY Acquisition Corp is a blank check company incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted company for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. As of the filing, it has not completed any business combination and has no operations or revenues. It has entered into a business combination agreement with StablecoinX Assets Inc. and StablecoinX Inc., subject to shareholder approval and other conditions.
